title: cosmo_fate: A locally preregistered fragility audit of DESI-era cosmic-fate claims
description: Reproducibility archive for "Is cosmic fate an inference or an assumption?" The archive retains the locally preregistered secondary-data analysis plan, explicitly labeled A-004--A-007 post-hoc audits, corrections, and provenance clarifications, original-weight nested samples, independent-seed evidence checks, fitted-truth LCDM null mocks, and the compressed-CMB and finite-mock evidence boundaries. The plan was frozen in local version control before the first fate result; the public repository was created later, so this is not described as a third-party-registry preregistration. Commit ancestry, grammar-specific P1 implementation provenance, and checksums are documented in plan/PREREGISTRATION_PROVENANCE.md.
